satisfaction.title: Your satisfaction is our goal
satisfaction.message: We always strive to provide the best experience for our valued customers, and we are happy to receive your suggestions and inquiries at any time

about.title: A road built on
about.description: Founded to power Saudi Arabia's growing mobility needs, Darb operates 53 premium service stations from the heart of Riyadh to the southern coasts of Jazan. We don't just sell fuel — we build journeys.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the most trusted and innovative fuel-retail network in Saudi Arabia by 2030.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Deliver premium energy and convenience experiences that move people, businesses and the Kingdom forward.

values.title: Our Values
values.text: Safety, hospitality, sustainability — at every station, every day.

vision2030.title: Vision 2030
vision2030.text: Aligned with Saudi Vision 2030 to diversify energy and elevate national mobility.

ev.title: Ready for what's next.
ev.subtitle: In partnership with EVIQ, we're rolling out fast-charging across our entire network — so the road ahead stays open, whatever you drive.
